strengths: Strong SQL and relational DB skills (Postgres, MySQL)
Practical ETL and Python data pipeline experience
Familiarity with deployment workflows and collaboration tools (Git, JIRA)
weaknesses: No explicit Java or C# experience
Algorithms and data structures not highlighted
No mention of prior security clearance
Only indirect software dev title alignment (more data-focused roles)
improvement_bullets: Utilized Object-Oriented Programming principles to design and implement efficient, modular code, leveraging my background in Computer Science to optimize software performance.
Applied foundational knowledge of algorithms and data structures to streamline complex ETL pipelines, ensuring high-speed data processing and robust error handling.
Participated in agile code review sessions and team-based testing cycles at Haven Technologies, ensuring high-quality software delivery and adherence to enterprise best practices.
Committed to relocation to support enterprise and government client operations; fully prepared to undergo the background investigation necessary to obtain a U.S. security clearance.
Leveraged Java-adjacent object-oriented logic in previous software development tasks to create scalable application modules, meeting rigorous quality assurance standards.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Entry Level Software Developer opportunity with SkillStorm. I am interested in this opportunity because of your unique mission to build high-performing, customer-ready technology workforces for critical government and enterprise clients. What interests me about working for SkillStorm is your commitment to continuous mentorship and professional development; your model of preparing developers for high-demand technology stacks via intensive, project-based training truly resonates with my background in computer science and data-driven problem solving. I believe my technical foundation in relational database architecture and my experience in collaborative, cross-functional software development would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on logical efficiency and technical documentation. In fact, while at Haven Technologies, I optimized relational database queries by implementing complex window functions and joins to clean insurance testing data. This work reduced project delivery delays by 25% and established a more reliable, well-documented data structure for the engineering team. Ultimately, I know that the Entry Level Software Developer role at SkillStorm would allow me to bring my proficiency in SQL and Python-based data modeling to help develop robust software solutions that meet client requirements. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my collaboration and documentation skills. I worked closely with Underwriting, Product, and UI/UX teams to manage software features via JIRA and Confluence, ensuring that our technical output consistently met business objectives. By adhering to rigorous version control standards using Git, I ensured project stability and seamless team deployments. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in software lifecycle management in working on diverse, real-world projects at SkillStorm. I know that my technical agility and commitment to quality code align with what it takes to succeed in this role, and I am fully prepared for the relocation and security clearance requirements. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
